sections.title: Primary Classes (1st to 5th Grade)
rows: Shorts and Shirt (colour as per specification of the Education Department, Chandigarh Administration)
Shirt and Tunic (colour as per specification of the Education Department, Chandigarh Administration)

sections.title: Middle & High Classes (6th to 10th Grade)
rows: Trousers and Shirt (colour as per specification of the Education Department, Chandigarh Administration)
Salwar / Skirt and Suit/Shirt (colour as per specification of the Education Department, Chandigarh Administration)

sections.title: Note to Parents
sections.content: Uniform color palettes and patterns are strictly governed by guidelines from the Education Department of Chandigarh Administration. Please verify current specifications with class teachers before buying.
